source.multipart_basis: Decomposition inferred from the original prompt; no rulebook citations added beyond those carried by the original sample.

full_prompt:
Design a bolted multi-body aluminum extrusion 90-degree corner joint assembly consisting of: (A) one vertical 40x40x600 mm aluminum extrusion (HFS8-4040-equivalent, 8-mm slot); (B) one horizontal 40x40x400 mm aluminum extrusion (HFS8-4040-equivalent) cantilevered from the vertical; (C) two or more large reinforcing corner brackets (HBLFSNB8-class); (D) pre-assembly M8 T-nuts (HNTT8-8-equivalent, 8-mm slot) seated in the extrusion slots; (E) M8 bolts clamping the brackets to the T-nuts. Extrusion material 6063-T5 (yield 170 MPa, Young's modulus 68.9 GPa, density 2700 kg/m^3, Ix = Iy = 90000 mm^4 per catalog).

Catalog 2024 per-bracket allowables for the HBLFSNB8-class large reinforcing corner bracket with two M8 pre-assembly T-nuts in each leg: static 1470 N (150 kgf), dynamic 490 N (50 kgf), allowable bending moment 29.4 N*m. Per-T-nut pull-out 2400 N (8-mm-slot catalog short-thread). Service payload at the free tip of the horizontal extrusion: vertical 300 N + horizontal 150 N, fatigue life >= 1e6 cycles at the dynamic load.

Pass/fail on the assembled model: (R1) per-bracket static force <= 1470 N under LC1; with two brackets at 40 mm effective moment arm the vertical-only demand per bracket is ~1500 N so the agent must add brackets / upsize or shorten the cantilever; (R2) per-bracket dynamic force <= 490 N for fatigue; (R3) per-bracket bending moment <= 29.4 N*m (demand 60 N*m/2 = 60 N*m is over catalog, must add brackets or gusset); (R4) horizontal extrusion tip deflection at cantilever tip <= L/300 = 1.33 mm at static service load; (R5) extrusion max bending stress <= 170 / 2.0 = 85 MPa; (R6) per-T-nut pull-out load <= 2400 / 2.0 = 1200 N; (R_asm1) assembly-scope connection DCR on every bracket-to-extrusion interface (bracket allowable load + bracket allowable moment + T-nut pull-out, envelope) <= 1.0 under LC1.

Manufacturing: cut 40x40 extrusions to length; install M8 T-nuts into each slot; mount brackets with M8 bolts; verify per-bracket reaction by test vs catalog. The final FEM check runs on the fully assembled model (vertical extrusion + horizontal extrusion + >=2 brackets + T-nuts + M8 bolts) with beam elements for the extrusions, solid elements at brackets, and contact / friction at each bracket-extrusion faying face. Per-part stress is reported but assembly-level passing requires all catalog-limit DCRs and the stiffness constraint to hold simultaneously.

Deliverables: STEP AP242 of the 90-deg corner joint assembly with the two extrusions, all brackets, all T-nuts, and all M8 bolts as distinct bodies tagged with part_family and instance_index; report with per-bracket reaction force and moment, extrusion tip deflection, max extrusion stress, per-T-nut pull-out, per-part max stress, assembly-level connection DCR, and selection justification.
short_prompt:
Design a bolted multi-body aluminum-extrusion 90-degree corner joint delivered as an assembly: a vertical 40x40x600 mm extrusion and a cantilevered horizontal 40x40x400 mm extrusion (HFS8-4040-equivalent, 8 mm slot), joined by >= 2 large reinforcing corner brackets (HBLFSNB8-class) with pre-assembly M8 T-nuts (HNTT8-8-equivalent) and M8 bolts. Extrusion 6063-T5 (yield 170 MPa, E = 68.9 GPa, rho = 2700 kg/m^3, Ix = Iy = 90000 mm^4).

Catalog 2024 per HBLFSNB8-class bracket with two M8 pre-assembly T-nuts per leg: static 1470 N (150 kgf); dynamic 490 N (50 kgf); allowable bending moment 29.4 N*m. Per-T-nut pull-out 2400 N (8-mm-slot short-thread).

Service payload at the horizontal tip: 300 N vertical + 150 N horizontal; fatigue life >= 1e6 cycles at dynamic load.

Pass limits: per-bracket static <= 1470 N; per-bracket dynamic <= 490 N; per-bracket moment <= 29.4 N*m (baseline demand of ~60 N*m per bracket exceeds this, so brackets must be added or a gusset introduced); tip deflection <= L/300 = 1.33 mm; extrusion bending stress <= 170/2.0 = 85 MPa; per-T-nut pull-out <= 2400/2.0 = 1200 N.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: Aluminum extrusion tip deflection is a closed-form cantilever formula using catalog Ix.

prompt.title: 40x40 aluminum-extrusion 90-deg corner joint with reinforcing bracket (multi-part assembly)
prompt.brief: Multi-body aluminum-extrusion corner: two HFS8-4040-equivalent extrusions + >=2 HBLFSNB8-class brackets + M8 T-nuts + M8 bolts. Must meet per-bracket catalog load/moment limits plus L/300 tip deflection at 300 N + 150 N tip payload. Final FEM check runs on the assembled model.

parts.name: vertical_extrusion
parts.role: vertical HFS8-4040-equivalent aluminum extrusion fixed at the base

parts.name: horizontal_extrusion
parts.role: horizontal HFS8-4040-equivalent aluminum extrusion cantilever that carries the tip payload

parts.name: corner_bracket
parts.role: HBLFSNB8-class large reinforcing corner bracket that transfers moment from horizontal to vertical extrusion
parts.material_hint: catalog bracket (steel or aluminum per catalog)

parts.name: t_nut
parts.role: HNTT8-8-equivalent pre-assembly M8 T-nut seated in the 8-mm slot

parts.name: m8_bolt
parts.role: M8 bolt clamping bracket to T-nut

assembly_envelope.overall_bbox: approximately 440 x 40 x 640 mm L-frame envelope (400 horizontal + 40 extrusion thickness x 600 vertical)
assembly_envelope.coordinate_system: Vertical extrusion along Z from base, horizontal extrusion along X at top of vertical

boundary_conditions.inter_part_fastener_stiffness: bracket clamps extrusion slot via M8 bolt + T-nut; contact + friction at bracket-extrusion faying face

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: Large reinforcing bracket catalog static allowable (HBLFSNB8-class)
Large reinforcing bracket catalog dynamic allowable (HBLFSNB8-class)
Large reinforcing bracket allowable bending moment (HBLFSNB8-class)
assembly-scope DCR on every bracket-to-extrusion interface, enveloping bracket force, bracket moment, and T-nut pull-out

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: beam for extrusions + solid for brackets

interfaces.load_path: bracket leg clamps vertical extrusion via M8 bolt + T-nut in slot
bracket leg clamps horizontal extrusion via M8 bolt + T-nut in slot
M8 bolt passes through bracket hole and threads into T-nut
T-nut seats in vertical extrusion 8-mm slot; pull-out resisted by slot walls
T-nut seats in horizontal extrusion 8-mm slot; pull-out resisted by slot walls

fem_check_policy.rationale: Multipart entries are verified on the assembled model. Per-part stress is reported but does not gate pass/fail.

notes.why_multi_part: A 40x40 aluminum-extrusion corner joint is fundamentally a multi-body system (two extrusions + brackets + T-nuts + M8 bolts) whose per-bracket reaction force and moment require explicit bodies; a single-body monolithic model cannot represent bracket load sharing against catalog limits.
notes.speculation_caveats: Bracket count >= 2 per the original prompt; T-nut and M8 bolt counts (8 each) are the minimum for two brackets with two legs x two T-nuts. Agent may upsize brackets or add more pairs per the catalog-limit check.
